name: io.github.jbeshir/assets-mcp
title: Assets
description: Search and fetch icons, illustrations, fonts, photos, textures, 3D models, audio, sprites and local game-art packs with license metadata.

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_DB
environmentVariables.description: Optional local assetsdb database root; remains active in offline mode

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory to write rendered assets to (default: OS temp dir + /assets-mcp)

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_DISABLE_REMOTE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to disable the keyless remote providers and run fully offline

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_CACHE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: On-disk cache dir for remote fetches (default: OS cache dir + /assets-mcp)

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Unsplash Access Key; enables the Unsplash photo provider when set

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_PIXABAY_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Pixabay API key; enables the Pixabay photo provider when set

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_PEXELS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Pexels API key; enables the Pexels photo provider when set

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_POLYPIZZA_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Poly Pizza API key; enables the Poly Pizza 3D model provider when set

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_POLYHAVEN_ENABLE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to enable Poly Haven models (its API terms are non-commercial)

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_JAMENDO_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Jamendo client id; enables the Jamendo audio provider when set

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_FREESOUND_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Freesound API key; enables the Freesound audio provider when set
